utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ursula ! Wait ! Err ... err , it is me ! Phoebe !

utterances.speaker: Ursula
utterances.text: Oh , I thought there was a mirror there . Okay , bye ... bye .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Wait a second ! So , what new with you ?

utterances.speaker: Ursula
utterances.text: Umm , nothing . I mean , I am getting married next week .
